raw_source.title: [China/Hong Kong] (Compliance Crypto Exchange) is looking for Frontend Web Engineer
raw_source.body:
## About
EX.IO is a Hong Kong-based virtual assets exchange, just obtained a VATP license(SFC Type1, 7) in Hong Kong. Our mission is to demolish the barriers of tradition and Web3 so that everyone can trade the fascinating new financial asset, virtual assets, with confidence.

## Responsibilities
●Responsible for developing Web product that support trading
●Maintain close collaboration with UI designer, product manager, and backend team, to produce product of high quality
●Optimize the process of development, performance and user experience continuously 

## Requirements
●More than 5 years of front-end development experience, experience in TradFi/ Securities / Web3/ Blockchain industry are preferred
●Proficient in front-end technology, such as JavaScript, CSS, and HTML, ES6 and ESNext
●Proficient in React and have the capabilities of architecture
●Familiar with front-end engineering
●Knowledge in performance optimizing
●Good learning ability and communicating skills
●Passionate about frontend technology and be able to work under pressure
●Strong self-management ability and a team worker

## Job Nature
Crypto Exchange(regulatory)

- Full-time or not: Full-time
- Remote or not: Remote work can be considered in other domestic cities besides Hong Kong and Shenzhen

## Contact
email: hr@ex.io
wechat id: twsnicole

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
